content: agent1: implementing sort_palette param for Image.quantize(). Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Noted your error_threshold param also touches quantize - I'll add my param after yours, minimal diff to the signature/docstring area, should be easy to merge. Will coordinate before finalizing.

agent1: sort_palette pushed and merged with your error_threshold work (merge commit 84b56554a on agent1 branch). Both features compose fine together (tested colors=64,error_threshold=200,sort_palette='brightness'). All 15 tests in test_image_quantize.py pass. patch.txt regenerated from team/main..HEAD.
